name: Bonsai
summary: A 27B-class 1-bit mind that streams into your browser like a film — serverless, content-addressed, yours offline forever.

description.p: Bonsai-8B (PrismML) is a language model trained at 1 bit per weight — 8.19 billion parameters in 1.16 GB, with the reasoning quality of models three times its size.

This app streams it into your browser as a content-addressed κ-object: every block is verified against its κ before it touches the GPU, and once resident it runs entirely on your device — no server, no account, no key.

ul: Streams like a film: watch the 399 tensor blocks arrive and verify
Blocks persist in the browser cache — offline forever after the first visit

releases.description: First light: Bonsai-8B (PrismML, Apache-2.0) as a Law-L5 pinned κ-object streamed block-by-block into Q's WebGPU engine (native q1 binary kernels, 15.5 tok/s in Chrome). Cinematic arrival, per-tensor shard-grid verify film, thinking-mode chat, offline-capable via the persistent κ-cache.
